en: Oh, dear. I'm so lucky to have you.
ko: 오, 자기야. 널 만나서 정말 다행이야.

en: He stole my LXT, that stupid man.
ko: 그 멍청한 남자가 내 LXT를 훔쳐갔어.

en: Cause I need you to need me. I'm empty, you feed me.
So refreshing. My little soda pop.
You're all I can think of. Every drop I drink of.
You're my soda pop. My little soda pop.
Cool me down, you're so hot. Pour me up, I won't stop.
You're my soda pop. Man, what a sick earworm.
And they just conjure hearts out of the air.
